title: AI Superhero
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a blockbuster superhero portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into an epic original superhero portrait. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, expression, pose, camera angle, and main framing. Reimagine clothing as a premium superhero suit with textures and colors inspired by the original outfit, add a powerful heroic stance, dramatic blockbuster lighting, a city skyline background, subtle dynamic energy effects, realistic facial detail, and sharp movie-poster quality. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, changed identity, deformed face, extra arms, extra legs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, duplicate features, watermark, logo, text, weak lighting, pixelated, horror, gore, blood, copied existing superhero costume, cropped body, unrealistic proportions, noise, artifacts, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. midnight city skyline, lightning suit...
